title: TOON Configuration
description: Configuration for .toonrc files. Settings here mirror the toon.* VS Code settings.

defaultBlockName.description: Default block name used for JSON-to-TOON conversion when the root is an array.

indentWidth.description: Number of spaces for row indentation in formatted output.

fieldSpacing.description: Comma spacing style in header field lists. 'compact': no spaces. 'spaced': space after comma.

debounceMs.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds for linting on document changes.

toJsonValueMode.description: TOON-to-JSON value mode. 'strings': all values as strings. 'typed': infer numbers, booleans, null.
